message:
test(fj-conformance): add oracle tests for Exp primitive

Add 22 oracle tests for Exp primitive covering:
- Special values (0, 1, -1, ln(2), ln(10))
- Large/small values and overflow/underflow
- Infinity and NaN
- Mathematical properties: additivity, inverse, exp-log relationship
- Strictly positive and monotonicity
- Complex numbers including Euler's identity (exp(iπ) = -1)
- 1D/2D tensor shapes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
